understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate a grid-based world, stepping on modifier tiles to change the attributes (shape, color, rotation) of a carried piece, so that it matches the requirements of one or more goal cells on the level. Once the piece matches a goal's shape, color, and rotation simultaneously, stepping onto the goal cell completes it. All goals in a level must be completed to advance, and all levels must be completed to win the game. The player must also manage stamina, as losing all stamina loses a life, and losing all lives ends the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The game takes place on a 2D grid with walls that block movement. The player character carries a piece that has three attributes: shape, color, and rotation (in degrees: 0, 90, 180, 270). Each level contains one or more goal cells that require specific combinations of these attributes. The grid has modifier tiles: shape changers cycle the piece's shape, color changers cycle its color, and rotation changers rotate the piece 90 degrees clockwise. Moving onto a modifier tile immediately applies its effect. The player can move in four directions (north, south, east, west). Each move consumes stamina; running out of stamina costs a life and resets stamina. The episode ended after repeated failed moves due to a wall, indicating the need to plan paths to reach modifier tiles and goals while avoiding stamina depletion.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate a grid-based world, stepping on modifier tiles to change the attributes (shape, color, rotation) of a carried piece, so that it matches the requirements of one or more goal cells on the level. Once the piece matches a goal's shape, color, and rotation simultaneously, stepping onto the goal cell completes it. All goals in a level must be completed to advance, and all levels must be completed to win the game. The player must also manage stamina, as losing all stamina loses a life, and losing all lives ends the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The game takes place on a 2D grid with walls that block movement. The player character carries a piece that has three attributes: shape, color, and rotation (in degrees: 0, 90, 180, 270). Each level contains one or more goal cells that require specific combinations of these attributes. The grid has modifier tiles: shape changers cycle the piece's shape, color changers cycle its color, and rotation changers rotate the piece 90 degrees clockwise. Moving onto a modifier tile immediately applies its effect. The player can move in four directions (north, south, east, west). Each move consumes stamina; running out of stamina costs a life and resets stamina. The episode ended after repeated failed moves due to a wall, indicating the need to plan paths to reach modifier tiles and goals while avoiding stamina depletion.
